The yields and kinematic characteristics of the
fission fragments have been measured for natural Pb
fission process by 7-Li ions with energy 35 MeV/nucleon

have been calculated by using the approximation
functions. The measurements of the ranges and recoil
directions allow to obtain the kinematic
characteristics of the fission fragments and
fissioning nuclei. The mean kinetic energies of the
fragments 140 MeV, approximately, are in a agreement
with Viola estimates.  The mean transferred
longitudinal momentum have been indicate on the part of
